name: Magic Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Vanilla Extract or Rum Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate at the top of a double boiler without stirring.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the sweetened condensed milk, salt, and flavoring until blended.
3. Press the mixture into a one-inch high block on wax paper-lined pan.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Turn out onto wax paper.
6. Remove the wax paper and cut into serving pieces.
7. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 1/2 pound.
